title: Utilities & Schema Helpers
description: JSON utilities, strict schema validation, type transforms, error tracing, pretty print, and approval util. All are module-level function collections (no class definitions); modeled as utility classes for UML purposes.

classes.name: StrictSchema
classes.notes: Recursively mutates JSON schema for OpenAI strict mode: sets additionalProperties=False, all properties required, converts oneOf→anyOf, inlines $ref when co-located with other keys, strips null defaults.

classes.name: JSONUtil
methods: validate_json(json_str: str, type_adapter: TypeAdapter[T], partial: bool) -> T
classes.notes: validate_json supports partial='trailing-strings'. On failure attaches SpanError to current span then raises ModelBehaviorError. _to_dump_compatible recursively converts dicts, lists/tuples, and generic Iterables.

classes.name: TypeTransforms
classes.notes: Converts tool names to valid function-call identifiers: spaces→underscore, non-alphanumeric→underscore via regex, then lowercase. Logs warning if transformation occurred.

classes.name: ErrorTracing
classes.notes: attach_error_to_current_span calls get_current_span(); logs warning if no active span. Bridges exception handling to tracing layer.

classes.name: ApprovalsUtil
methods: evaluate_needs_approval_setting(needs_approval_setting: bool | Callable, *args, default: bool=False, strict: bool=True) -> bool  [async]
classes.notes: Handles bool or callable (sync or async) needs_approval. Awaits if callable returns Awaitable. Falls back to default when strict=False and type is invalid.

classes.name: PrettyPrint
classes.notes: _final_output_str handles None/str/BaseModel(model_dump_json)/fallback. pretty_print_* format last/current agent, final output type+value, item/response/guardrail counts.

classes.name: MaybeAwaitable
classes.notes: Generic type alias used across async utilities.

key_relationships: JSONUtil depends_on SpanError (constructs SpanError on ValidationError)
JSONUtil depends_on ModelBehaviorError (raises on bad JSON)
ErrorTracing depends_on Span, SpanError, get_current_span (from tracing module)
StrictSchema depends_on UserError (raises for invalid additionalProperties)
ApprovalsUtil depends_on UserError (raises for invalid approval type)
PrettyPrint depends_on RunResult, RunResultStreaming, RunResultBase, RunErrorDetails (TYPE_CHECKING only)
TypeTransforms depends_on logger (warns on name transformation)
important_notes: All modules are pure function collections — no classes instantiated. StrictSchema is adapted from openai-python's _pydantic.py. JSONUtil partial validation uses pydantic experimental_allow_partial='trailing-strings'. ApprovalsUtil is shared between run_internal and realtime to avoid cross-package deps.
